SEARCH
Package p2main

Class Election

java.lang.Object
p2main.Election
public class Election extends Object
Election is the main driver class of the voting system. It prompts the user for election information, processes the ballot file, and invokes the appropriate voting algorithm.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • Election

      public Election()
      Default constructor for Election.

  • Method Details

    • promptForInput

      public void promptForInput(Scanner scanner, BallotFileReader ballotFileReader) throws Exception
      Prompts user for a ballot file name and parses the file's header to initialize election information variables
      Parameters:
      scanner - scanner object used to read user input to store election type, ballot file name, and number of seats
      ballotFileReader - ballot file reader object used to read ballot files
      Throws:
      Exception - throws an exception if there are invalid inputs

    • processBallotFile

      public void processBallotFile(BallotFileReader ballotFileReader)
      Process the ballots from the ballot files.
      Parameters:
      ballotFileReader - Object responsible for reading ballots from the ballot files

    • getElectionType

      public String getElectionType()
      Gets the election type string
      Returns:
      PV or STV

    • getCandidates

      public String[] getCandidates()
      Gets string array of candidates for election.
      Returns:
      String array of candidates

    • setCandidates

      public void setCandidates(String[] candidates)
      Sets the candidates for the election.
      Parameters:
      candidates - An array of strings representing the candidates' names.

    • getBallots

      public List<Ballot> getBallots()
      Gets list of ballots cast in election.
      Returns:
      list of ballot objects

    • getNumSeats

      public int getNumSeats()
      Gets number of seats.
      Returns:
      number of seats

    • getVotingAlgorithm

      public VotingAlgorithm getVotingAlgorithm()
      Gets VotingAlgorithm.
      Returns:
      the VotingAlgorithm class that is picked.

    • getAuditFileName

      public String getAuditFileName()
      Gets audit file name
      Returns:
      String containing audit file's name

    • getShuffle

      public boolean getShuffle()
      Gets shuffle value
      Returns:
      true for on, false for off

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Main method to run election program. Initializes the election, prompts the user for input, processes the ballot file, and runs the election.
      Parameters:
      args - command line arguments
